HERO.TITLE: Hi, I’m
HERO.SUB_DESCRIPTION: Software Engineer with 5+ years building and scaling web platforms.
HERO.DESCRIPTION: Software Engineer specialising in web platforms and cloud infrastructure. I build with TypeScript, Angular, React, Symfony and Docker, and I care about measurable outcomes: CI/CD pipelines that cut deploy times from 35 minutes to under 10, cloud migrations that reduced hosting costs by 30%, and performance work that cut peak database load by 38%.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.TEXT: Hi, I’m Serjio, a Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience across web development, cloud infrastructure and IT systems. I work with TypeScript, Angular, React, Symfony, Laravel and Docker, and I’ve led CI/CD adoption, cloud migrations and performance optimisation. I also mentor new engineers and document what I build.

EXPERIENCE.JOB1_TASK1: CI/CD & deployment: Introduced automated CI/CD pipelines, cutting deploy time from 35 minutes to under 10 and reducing failed releases by 40%.
EXPERIENCE.JOB1_TASK2: Web development (Symfony & Angular): Design and maintenance of custom platforms in Symfony (PHP), TypeScript, Angular and HTML5/CSS3, including completing and shipping pre-existing TypeScript projects to production. Developed the company’s main website, contributing to a 30% increase in customer acquisition and conversion.
EXPERIENCE.JOB1_TASK3: Performance & cloud: Isolated overloaded sites and resolved resource bottlenecks, cutting peak-hour database load by 38%. Led cloud migrations of internal tools and websites, reducing hosting costs by 30% and maintenance time by 45%.
EXPERIENCE.JOB1_TASK4: WordPress & PrestaShop management: Installation and configuration of new sites, domain (DNS) management, email services and SSL certificates. Advanced technical support to the design team on bugs and general issues, including Elementor-based sites.
EXPERIENCE.JOB1_TASK5: SEO, monitoring & security: Implementation of Google Analytics 4, advanced Google Tag Manager setup, reCAPTCHA form protection and technical SEO, improving organic visibility and site security.
EXPERIENCE.JOB1_TASK6: Mentoring & documentation: Mentored new engineers and authored SaaS feature documentation, standardising workflows and cutting onboarding time.
EXPERIENCE.JOB2_TASK1: SaaS feature delivery: Built and shipped client-specific feature customisations on the core SaaS platform across 7 client projects, including fully responsive dynamic templates (HTML, SCSS, JavaScript) integrated into the company software.
EXPERIENCE.JOB2_TASK2: SEO platform: Built a managed SEO blog platform, a custom Symfony CMS migrated from a legacy WordPress database, with article, category, tag and metadata management, semantic URLs and a mobile-optimised template, lifting organic traffic by 40%.
EXPERIENCE.JOB2_TASK3: AR/VR — Unity & Oculus App Lab: Developed immersive applications in Unity with C#, including a VR app for Meta Quest published on App Lab. Full cycle: 3D modelling, interactive logic, optimisation and deployment. Also produced Blender models for 3D printing and WebAR visualisation.
EXPERIENCE.JOB2_TASK4: Architecture & collaboration: Collaborated with senior engineers in architecture reviews, proposing two approved API-versioning approaches.
EXPERIENCE.JOB2_TASK5: Reliability & support: Diagnosed and fixed production bugs across the codebase, cutting recurring error tickets by 20%. Handled complex technical tickets, including virtual reality features and platform performance optimisation.
EXPERIENCE.JOB2_TASK6: Database management: Migration, export and integration of complex databases to ensure efficiency, security, data integrity and platform stability.

SKILLS.LANGUAGES_VALUE: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, PHP, Bash, SQL, HTML, CSS
SKILLS.FRAMEWORKS_VALUE: React, Angular, Symfony, Laravel, Backbone, Docker, FastAPI
SKILLS.CONCEPTS_VALUE: OOP, Distributed Systems, Event-Driven Architecture, RESTful APIs, CI/CD, Machine Learning
SKILLS.CERTIFICATE_VALUE: Google IT Support Professional Certificate — I.I.S.S. Luigi dell’Erba, Castellana Grotte (BA)
